title: athyrium interjectum
intro: Athyrium interjectum, also known as the lady fern, is a type of flowering plant in the fern family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Athyrium interjectum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the lady fern include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
